user.description: Select the Ergostol desk to add.

abort.no_devices_found: No Ergostol desks found. Make sure the desk's Bluetooth adapter is powered and in range of Home Assistant.

init.title: Quiet hours
init.description: Pause background height polling during this daily window so the desk's LED panel stays dark (e.g. overnight). Explicit moves still work. Leave both empty to poll around the clock.
